patches.name: Add Packet Handler
patches.description:
Adding the Loco Packet Handler allows external applications to handle the app's packets, which may compromise security.
Conflicts may occur on some systems.

patches.name: Add Pine Lib
patches.description: add libpine.so to the app's native libraries

patches.name: Allow Hide on Any Chat
patches.description: Users with hiding privileges can hide any chat, including their own messages.

patches.name: Allow reply to feed
patches.description: Allows replying to feed messages

patches.name: Always Show Kick Button
patches.description: Always shows the kick button in group member management.

patches.name: Bypass Moat check
patches.description: Bypass Moat check that prevents the app from running.

patches.name: Bypass getText
patches.description: Bypasses the integrity check for getText.

patches.name: Bypass input mention limit in non-multichat
patches.description: Bypass the limit of input mentions in non-multichat rooms

patches.name: Change model
patches.description: Changes the device model to supporting subdevice features

patches.name: Custom branding
patches.description: Customize app branding (name)

patches.name: Default external browser
patches.description: Sets the default external browser for KakaoTalk to the system's default browser.

patches.name: Dimens Patch
patches.description: reassigns ad_minimum_height to 0dp to remove ads from the app.

patches.name: Disable 300+ unread limit
patches.description: Always show the real unread count instead of '300+' in chatroom list

patches.name: Disable 99 unread limit
patches.description: Skip the 99-cap so unread count shows full value

patches.name: Disable ChatRoomAdController
patches.description: Disables the ChatRoomAdController to prevent ads from being shown in chat room list

patches.name: Disable Collapse Button
patches.description: Disable collapse button on OpenChatList

patches.name: Disable Comment Ad
patches.description: Disables the comment ad in the app.

patches.name: Disable Community Tab
patches.description: Disables Community Tab

patches.name: Disable Friend Feed tab
patches.description: Disables the Friend Feed tab in KakaoTalk.

patches.name: Disable Friend Lists ad
patches.description: Disables the Friend Lists ad in KakaoTalk.

patches.name: Disable Image Ad
patches.description: Disables the image ad in the app.

patches.name: Disable S2Event
patches.description: Disables Tracker

patches.name: Disable SDK Tracker
patches.description: Disables the SDK Tracker in KakaoTalk.

patches.name: Disable Sentry
patches.description: Disables Sentry error reporting in KakaoTalk.

patches.name: Disable Sentry telemetry
patches.description: Disables Sentry telemetry. See https://sentry.io/for/android/ for more information.

patches.name: Disable Talk Share Log
patches.description: Disable talk share log

patches.name: Disable ad controller
patches.description: Disables the ad controller that manages ads in the app.

patches.name: Disable chat room list ad
patches.description: Disable the chat room list ad.

patches.name: Disable update check
patches.description: Disables the app's update check.

patches.name: Disable verifying signature
patches.description: Disables the signature verification check that prevents the app from running.

patches.name: Enable OneStore feature
patches.description: Enables the OneStore feature in DC Inside app.

patches.name: Enable reaction mention flag
patches.description: Enables the reaction mention flag in KakaoTalk chat logs.

patches.name: Enable recording pause/resume feature
patches.description: Enable recording pause/resume feature in KakaoTalk

patches.name: Enable send big text
patches.description: Allows sending big text messages in KakaoTalk.

patches.name: Force enable debug mode
patches.description: Enables debug mode in the app.

patches.name: Force enable emoticon plus feature
patches.description: Force enable emoticon plus feature (Unpurchased emoticon can be sent once per day)

patches.name: Ghost Mode
patches.description: Don't expose your typing status to the other party.

patches.name: Hide Main Ad
patches.description: Hides the main ad in the app.

patches.name: Hook Package Manager
patches.description: Hooks the Package Manager to bypass integrity checks.

patches.name: Ignore Check Package Name
patches.description: Ignores the package name check to allow installation of modified versions.

patches.name: Override feature flag
patches.description: Overrides the feature flag to enable the feature.

options.title: Feature flag overrides
options.description: Enter feature flag overrides as semicolon-separated key=value pairs.

patches.name: Play YouTube player in chat room
patches.description: Allows playing YouTube videos in KakaoTalk chat rooms.

patches.name: Remove BizBoard ads
patches.description: Removes the BizBoard ad by forcing its dimensions to 0x0 and visibility to GONE in onMeasure.

patches.name: Remove More tab ad
patches.description: Removes the ad from the More tab.

patches.name: Remove OpenLink chat room list ad
patches.description: Removes the OpenLink chat room list ad.

patches.name: Remove Short-form Tab
patches.description: Removes the Short-form tab from the now fragment.

patches.name: Remove feed ad
patches.description: Removes the feed ad from the app.

patches.name: Remove focus ad
patches.description: Removes the focus ad from the app.

patches.name: Remove native ad
patches.description: Removes the native ad from the app.

patches.name: Remove shop tab
patches.description: Removes the shop tab from the bottom navigation bar.

patches.name: Show deleted or hidden messages
patches.description: Allows you to see deleted/hidden messages in chat logs.

patches.name: Spoof App ID
patches.description: Spoofs the App ID to bypass integrity checks. (to bypass biometric auth etc.)

patches.name: Spoof Signature
patches.description: Spoofs the app signature to bypass integrity checks.

patches.name: Spoof apk checksums
patches.description: Spoofs the apk checksums to pass integrity checks.

patches.name: Spoof signature
patches.description: Spoofs the app signature to pass integrity checks.

patches.name: Update Provider Patch
patches.description: It allows you to install the clone app just like the original.

patches.name: Version info patch
patches.description: Patches the version info to include '(ReVanced)' in the version string.
